name: claude-md-updater
description: Update CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and GEMINI.md files with diff-based or content-based analysis

plugins.name: claude-md-updater
plugins.description: Update CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and GEMINI.md files. Two modes: (1) Diff-based - analyze git diff between commits to update incrementally; (2) Content-based - analyze current files to regenerate from scratch. Supports bottom-up processing with parallel subagents for large projects.
